name: Operating System
synopsis: Introduction to operating system concepts including process management, memory management, and file systems.
references: Silberschatz, A. (2019). Operating System Concepts. Wiley.
Bhatt, P.C.P. (2019). An Introduction to Operating Systems. PHI Learning.

name: Programming Fundamentals
synopsis: Introduction to programming using structured programming approach.
references: Deitel, P. (2020). Java How to Program. Pearson.
Savitch, W. (2018). Absolute Java. Pearson.

name: Object Oriented Programming
synopsis: Programming using object-oriented paradigm with Java.
references: Deitel, P. (2020). Java How to Program. Pearson.
Horstmann, C.S. (2019). Core Java. Prentice-Hall.

name: Data Structure
synopsis: Fundamental data structures and algorithm design techniques.
references: Cormen, T.H. (2009). Introduction to Algorithms. MIT Press.
Goodrich, M.T. (2014). Data Structures and Algorithms in Java. Wiley.

name: Database Management
synopsis: Relational database design and SQL programming.
references: Silberschatz, A. (2019). Database System Concepts. McGraw-Hill.
Date, C.J. (2003). An Introduction to Database Systems. Addison-Wesley.

name: Computer Networks
synopsis: Introduction to networking fundamentals and TCP/IP protocols.
references: Tanenbaum, A.S. (2021). Computer Networks. Pearson.
Forouzan, B.A. (2013). Data Communications and Networking. McGraw-Hill.

name: Software Engineering Fundamentals
synopsis: Introduction to software development lifecycle and practices.
references: Pressman, R.S. (2020). Software Engineering: A Practitioner's Approach. McGraw-Hill.
Sommerville, I. (2016). Software Engineering. Pearson.

name: Software Requirement and Design
synopsis: Requirements gathering, analysis, and software system design.
references: Sommerville, I. (2016). Software Engineering. Pearson.
Wiegers, K. (2013). Software Requirements. Microsoft Press.

name: Web Programming
synopsis: Front-end and back-end web development techniques.
references: Flanagan, D. (2020). JavaScript: The Definitive Guide. O'Reilly.
Nixon, R. (2021). Learning PHP, MySQL & JavaScript. O'Reilly.

name: Introduction to Information Technology
synopsis: Overview of IT concepts, computer hardware, software, and the internet.
references: Shelly, G.B. (2018). Discovering Computers. Cengage.
Evans, A. (2019). Technology in Action. Pearson.

name: Human Computer Interaction
synopsis: Principles of user interface design and usability.
references: Dix, A. (2004). Human Computer Interaction. Pearson.
Rogers, Y. (2019). Interaction Design. Wiley.

name: System Analysis and Design
synopsis: Techniques for analysing and designing information systems.
references: Whitten, J.L. (2007). Systems Analysis and Design Methods. McGraw-Hill.
Dennis, A. (2018). Systems Analysis and Design. Wiley.

name: Network Security
synopsis: Introduction to network and information security concepts.
references: Stallings, W. (2019). Cryptography and Network Security. Pearson.
Pfleeger, C.P. (2015). Security in Computing. Prentice-Hall.

name: Mobile Application Development
synopsis: Developing mobile applications for Android platform.
references: Meier, R. (2018). Professional Android. Wiley.
Phillips, B. (2018). Android Programming. Big Nerd Ranch.

name: Cloud Technology
synopsis: Introduction to cloud computing services and deployment.
references: Buyya, R. (2013). Cloud Computing. Wiley.
Sosinsky, B. (2011). Cloud Computing Bible. Wiley.

name: Discrete Mathematics
synopsis: Mathematical foundations including logic, sets, and graph theory.
references: Rosen, K.H. (2019). Discrete Mathematics and Its Applications. McGraw-Hill.
Johnsonbaugh, R. (2018). Discrete Mathematics. Pearson.

name: Computer Mathematics
synopsis: Applied mathematics for computer science including number theory.
references: Rosen, K.H. (2019). Discrete Mathematics and Its Applications. McGraw-Hill.
Anton, H. (2013). Elementary Linear Algebra. Wiley.

name: Digital Technology Fundamentals
synopsis: Overview of digital technologies and computing concepts.
references: Brookshear, J.G. (2018). Computer Science: An Overview. Pearson.
Shelly, G.B. (2018). Discovering Computers. Cengage.

name: Computer Architecture and Organization
synopsis: Structure of computers, CPU design, and memory organization.
references: Patterson, D.A. (2017). Computer Organization and Design. Morgan Kaufmann.
Hamacher, C. (2011). Computer Organization. McGraw-Hill.

name: Algorithm Design
synopsis: Advanced data structures, graph algorithms, and algorithm complexity.
references: Cormen, T.H. (2009). Introduction to Algorithms. MIT Press.
Sedgewick, R. (2011). Algorithms. Addison-Wesley.

name: Professional Communication
synopsis: Communication skills for IT professionals.
references: Beer, D. (2013). A Guide to Writing as an Engineer. Wiley.
Markel, M. (2019). Technical Communication. Bedford/St. Martin's.

name: Project Management
synopsis: Principles and practices of IT project management.
references: Schwalbe, K. (2018). Information Technology Project Management. Cengage.
PMI. (2017). A Guide to the Project Management Body of Knowledge. PMI.

name: Advanced Web Development
synopsis: Advanced web application development with modern frameworks.
references: Flanagan, D. (2020). JavaScript: The Definitive Guide. O'Reilly.
Banks, A. (2020). Learning React. O'Reilly.

name: Wireless and Mobile Networks
synopsis: Wireless communication technologies and mobile network protocols.
references: Forouzan, B.A. (2013). Data Communications and Networking. McGraw-Hill.
Stallings, W. (2019). Wireless Communications and Networks. Pearson.

name: Software Testing
synopsis: Testing techniques and quality assurance for software systems.
references: Myers, G.J. (2011). The Art of Software Testing. Wiley.
Pressman, R.S. (2020). Software Engineering: A Practitioner's Approach. McGraw-Hill.

name: Bahasa Kebangsaan A
synopsis: Malaysian national language proficiency.
references: Dewan Bahasa dan Pustaka. (2018). Tatabahasa Dewan. DBP.
Hashim Musa. (2015). Pengantar Linguistik Am. UM Press.

name: Hubungan Etnik
synopsis: Ethnic relations and nation building in Malaysia.
references: Shamsul Amri. (2011). Modul Hubungan Etnik. UNITAR.
Nazri Muslim. (2010). Hubungan Etnik di Malaysia. Pearson.

name: Final Year Project I
synopsis: Individual project proposal, literature review and initial implementation.
references: Kumar, R. (2019). Research Methodology. SAGE.
Fellows, R. (2008). Research Methods for Construction. Wiley.

name: Final Year Project II
synopsis: Continuation of Final Year Project — implementation, testing and presentation.
references: Kumar, R. (2019). Research Methodology. SAGE.
Fellows, R. (2008). Research Methods for Construction. Wiley.

name: Industrial Training
synopsis: Practical industrial training in IT-related organisations.
references: Politeknik Metro Tasek Gelugor. (2023). Industrial Training Handbook.
